name: Kevin Evers
bio: Kevin Evers is listed by Harleton ISD as board Vice President and Place 4 trustee, appointed in February 2024 with a term expiring in November 2026. RepWatchr applies the same scrutiny here as every other trustee: appointment records, votes, attendance, Chapter 171 disclosures, recusals, vendors, campaign records, and public-source family or employment ties must be checked before any score-moving conclusion.
